<thought>
I am at cell row 02 column B facing right (`>`). The next cell forward (row 02, column C) contains lava (`L`), which is deadly. Therefore, I should not move forward. To reach the goal at row 04, column D, I should first turn downwards (facing down `v`). To change orientation from right (`>`) to down (`v`), I need to turn clockwise.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 02 column B and facing down (`v`). The goal `O` is at row 04 column D. Moving forward will lead me to row 03 column B, which is safe. However, to get closer to the goal, I should move forward and then navigate around the lava `L` cells in columns C rows 2 and 3 by moving right at row 03 or 04. First, I will move forward to get closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 03 column B and I am facing down (`v`). The goal is at row 04 column D. Moving forward leads me to cell 04 column B which is floor (`.`) and safe, but it won't get me closer to the goal. The lava is at column C in rows 02 and 03, so I should avoid moving forward now. To reach the goal, I need to move right. From facing down, to face right, I will turn clockwise.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 03 column B facing left (`<`). Ahead to the left is a wall (`#` at row 03 column A), so I cannot move forward. The goal is at row 04 column D. To approach the goal safely, I need to change my orientation to face down (`v`) and then move forward to avoid lava. To face down from left, I will turn clockwise.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 03 column B facing up (`^`). The goal is at row 04 column D. If I move forward, I will go to row 02 column B, which is a safe floor ('.'). From there, I can navigate around lava to reach the goal. Moving forward is safe now.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 02 column B facing up (`^`). The goal is at row 04 column D. The path ahead (row 01 column B) is a wall, so I cannot move forward. I need to turn to face right (`>`) to avoid lava at column C and move towards the goal. To rotate from up (`^`) to right (`>`), I will turn clockwise.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 02 column B and I am facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 04 column D. However, moving forward from my current position leads directly into a lava cell at row 02 column C. To avoid the lava, I should rotate to explore another path. Turning clockwise will face me down, which allows me to move safely into row 03 column B next.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 02, column B, facing down (`v`). The goal is at row 04, column D. The cell in front (row 03, column B) is safe (floor), so moving forward is safe. I will advance forward to get closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am currently at row 03 column B facing down (`v`). The goal is at row 04 column D. To reach the goal, I need to move down one cell to row 04 column B, then turn right and move towards column D. However, the cell in front (row 04 column B) is floor and safe. Therefore, I will move forward first.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 04 column B and I am facing down (`v`). The goal is at row 04 column D. There is lava at columns C in rows 02 and 03, but the path at row 04 column C is clear. I should move forward to row 05 column B, but there is a wall, so I cannot move forward. To reach the goal at D4, I should turn right (facing right `>`), so I will turn clockwise.
</thought>

GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 04 column B facing left (`<`). The goal is at row 04 column D. To move toward the goal, I need to face right (`>`). From left to right, the quickest rotation is turning clockwise twice or counter-clockwise twice; I will start by turning clockwise once to face up (`^`).
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 04 column B facing up (`^`). The goal is at row 04 column D. Moving forward will put me into cell row 03 column B which is safe ('.'). To eventually reach the goal, I need to maneuver around lava cells at (02,C) and (03,C). The next step is safe to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE

<thought>
I am at cell row 03 column B and I am facing up (`^`). The lava cells at C2 and C3 make moving forward unsafe. The goal is at row 04 column D. I need to face right (`>`) to avoid lava and approach the goal safely. To rotate from up to right, I need to turn clockwise.
</thought>

GIRA_HORARIO

<thought>
